input_contract.registry: Validate registry-like inputs against Registry.schema.json before use.
input_contract.theory_source: Read local TeX only from an explicit operator-provided path.

output_contract.audit: Preserve derived_status, missing_obligations, residual ledgers, and external failure modes.
output_contract.diagnostic: Treat diagnostics as safe results, not process crashes.

residual_policy.external: Carry residual coordinates forward until an accepted ExternalVerifierHook discharges the matching obligation.
residual_policy.finite: Do not drop finite checker residuals during planning.

safety_invariants: derived_status comes only from checker output
external obligations cannot promote a claim without accepted verifier evidence
